NAVAREA XIX 58/26



NORWEGIAN SEA. ANDOEYA AND SENJA W

MILITARY EXERCISE ACTIVITY AND SHARP SHOOTING

FROM 04MAY TO 08MAY DAILY 2000UTC TO 0300UTC26 AND FROM 10MAY TO 14MAY26 DAYLY 1600UTC TO 0300UTC26

MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS



DANGER AREA SEA NOVEMBER.

A. 69-01.00N 015-30.00E

B. 69-06.00N 014-54.00E

C. 68-59.00N 014-15.00E

D. 69-12.05N 013-22.51E

H. 69-41.00N 015-54.00E

I. 69-25.00N 015-28.00E

J. 69-11.00N 015-51.00E

D. 70-02.00N 016-42.00E

H. 69-17.00N 016-51.00E



FOR COORDINATION ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON.

TELEPHONE 0047 94 07 59 44. 0047 76 14 45 87 OR MARITIME

VHF CH 14 AND 16 CALLSIGN ANDOEYA SPACE. E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO.

FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 08/2026

WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS AND WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY

UPDATES AND MAPS.
